headings.text: Two Days. Three Tracks. Forty‑Two Sessions.

paragraphs.text: Deep technical talks, hands‑on workshops, and hardware demos across the Systems Core, Edge & Embedded, and Platform Ops tracks. Times are listed in Eastern Time (ET).
Workshops are capped at 30 seats and require an additional ticket selection during checkout. Bring a laptop with admin access; required toolchains are listed per session.
Wait‑list opens 14 days before the summit.
Catered lunch is served on the Expo Floor from 12:30–14:00 both days. Vegetarian, vegan, halal, and gluten‑free options are available — please note preferences when you register.
Final program publishes September 22. Subscribe via the registration page for change notices.
Building the infrastructure that refuses to fail.
October 9–10, 2025 · David L. Lawrence Convention Center · Pittsburgh, PA

visibleText: Ironclad . Summit Home Schedule Speakers Venue Register Program · October 9–10, 2025 Two Days. Three Tracks. Forty‑Two Sessions. Deep technical talks, hands‑on workshops, and hardware demos across the Systems Core, Edge & Embedded, and Platform Ops tracks. Times are listed in Eastern Time (ET). Systems Core Edge & Embedded Platform Ops Conference Program Day 1 — Oct 9 Time Track Session Room 08:30 Ops Doors Open · Registration & Coffee Lobby 09:15 Core Keynote — Designing for Failure at Scale Hall A 10:30 Core Quorum Math: Practical Paxos in Multi‑Region Stores Hall A 10:30 Edge Power Budgets for ARM Fleet Devices Hall B 11:45 Ops On‑Call Without Tears: Rebuilding Incident Response Hall B 12:30 Ops Lunch Break · Expo Floor Open Expo 14:00 Core Lock‑Free Data Structures in Practice Hall A 14:00 Edge Workshop — Custom Linux for Embedded Boards Lab 1 15:30 Ops Capacity Forecasting When Your Graphs Lie Hall A 16:45 Core Building Storage Tiers on Commodity NVMe Hall B 18:00 Ops Opening Reception · Hardware Expo Mixer Expo Day 2 — Oct 10 Time Track Session Room 08:45 Ops Morning Coffee · Sponsor Lounge Open Lobby 09:30 Core Keynote — The Hidden Cost of Eventual Consistency Hall A 10:45 Edge OTA Update Strategies for Constrained Devices Hall B 10:45 Core Cache Coherency on Modern Server CPUs Hall A 12:00 Ops Observability Beyond Three Pillars Hall A 12:45 Ops Lunch Break · Lightning Talks at Stage 2 Expo 14:15 Edge Workshop — Signal Integrity for Backplane Designers Lab 2 14:15 Core Distributed Tracing at 10M Spans/Second Hall A 15:45 Ops Cost Engineering as a First‑Class Practice Hall B 17:00 Core Closing Panel — Resilient Infrastructure in 2030 Hall A 18:15 Ops Farewell Reception & Awards Expo Workshop Pre‑Registration Workshops are capped at 30 seats and require an additional ticket selection during checkout. Bring a laptop with admin access; required toolchains are listed per session. Custom Linux for Embedded Boards Signal Integrity for Backplane Designers Hands‑on Quorum Replay Lab Wait‑list opens 14 days before the summit. Lunch Break Catered lunch is served on the Expo Floor from 12:30–14:00 both days. Vegetarian, vegan, halal, and gluten‑free options are available — please note preferences when you register. Tracks at a Glance Core Distributed systems & storage Edge Embedded & hardware Ops Reliability & platforms Schedule is provisional. Final program publishes September 22.
